## ✅ Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] No unnecessary console.log / print statements
- [ ] Error handling is implemented
- [ ] No hardcoded values (using config/env vars)

### Testing
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] Manual testing performed
- [ ] All existing tests still pass

### Documentation
- [ ] Code comments added where needed
- [ ] API documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] README updated (if applicable)

### AI Module (if applicable)
- [ ] Model accuracy meets threshold (MAE < 3.0)
- [ ] Fallback mechanism still works
- [ ] Feature engineering unchanged or updated

### Security
- [ ] No sensitive data in code
- [ ] Input validation implemented
- [ ] Authentication/authorization checked
